taskTemplate.name: Title (Ownership Report)
taskTemplate.description: Review title ownership report for correct vesting, liens, judgments, and legal description

subTaskTemplate.name: Customer Name & Property Address
subTaskTemplate.description: Customer Name & Property Address – Correct customer name and subject property address reflected on title report
subTaskTemplate.type: Title (Ownership Report) – Customer Name & Property Address

subTaskTemplate.name: Vesting / Ownership
subTaskTemplate.description: Vesting / Ownership – Title vested in all loan borrowers; any additional owners not on the loan are identified and must be added as non-borrowing owners

subTaskTemplate.name: Deed Review
subTaskTemplate.description: Deed Review – Current deed matches vested owners; ownership aligns with borrowers and/or required non-borrowing owners

subTaskTemplate.name: Mortgages / Liens
subTaskTemplate.description: Mortgages / Liens – Mortgages shown are consistent with the loan application; any additional liens identified must be reviewed and cleared by underwriting

subTaskTemplate.name: Judgments
subTaskTemplate.description: Judgments – Title report reflects no outstanding judgments

subTaskTemplate.name: Legal Description
subTaskTemplate.description: Legal Description – Exhibit A is present
